changes.value:
Nine failures in src/components/fields/editors/attachment-editor.test.tsx:
- renders attachment filenames
- renders remove buttons for each attachment
- fires onChange with attachment removed from array
- fires onChange with empty array when removing last attachment
- fires onChange with path appended when open() resolves with paths
- does NOT fire onChange when open() resolves with null (cancelled)
- filters out numbers from an attachment array
- filters out objects without an id property
- keeps a single AttachmentMeta object

#test-failure
